iterations.theme: The Sweatcoin Story: Building a Viral, Gamified Fitness App with a Unique Economy
iterations.reason_for_cut: The entire podcast episode covers a single, continuous narrative about Sweatcoin's development, growth, monetization, and underlying philosophy, making a single iteration the most natural and cohesive structure, despite slightly exceeding the ideal duration range.

chapters.topic: Podcast Introduction & Guest Welcome
Introduction to Sweatcoin: Core Concept & Problem Solved
The Name 'Sweatcoin' & How the App Works
Gamification vs. Incentives: Sweatcoin's Approach
Early Growth Challenges & Y Combinator Experience

Sweatcoin's In-App Currency vs. Crypto Token
Creating Value for Users & Partners: The 'Cold Start' Problem
Monetization through Rewarded Videos (Opt-in Ads)
Scaling Growth: The Influencer Hub & Controlled Virality
Understanding & Managing Viral Growth
Monetization Strategy: Beyond Ads & Partnerships
The Shift to Subscriptions & B2B Opportunities (NHS Example)
Layering Value in Subscriptions: Removing Limitations
Platform Experience & Premium Offerings
User Segmentation: Rewards-Driven vs. Health-Driven

Emotional vs. Rational Value of In-App Currency
Lessons from Gaming & In-App Economies (Tinder, Duolingo)
The Right Application of Gamification
Concluding Remarks & Future Outlook
